allow: Bash(which node npm npx python3 pip3 cargo rustc 2>/dev/null; node --version 2>/dev/null; npm --version 2>/dev/null; python3 --version 2>/dev/null; cargo --version 2>/dev/null)
Bash(npm list -g --depth=0 2>/dev/null | head -30; npx create-electron-app --version 2>/dev/null || true)
Bash(pip3 show PyMuPDF PyQt6 pyinstaller pywebview 2>/dev/null || pip3 list 2>/dev/null | grep -i "pymupdf\\|pyqt\\|pyinstaller\\|pywebview\\|tkinter")
Bash(pip3 list 2>/dev/null | head -50)

Bash(npm show electron-vite 2>/dev/null | grep -E "description|keywords|version" | head -10)
Bash(npm show react-colorful version 2>/dev/null; npm show @hello-pangea/dnd version 2>/dev/null; npm show react-intersection-observer version 2>/dev/null)

Bash(npm run build 2>&1)
Bash(npm install immer 2>&1 | tail -5)

Bash(npx tsc --project tsconfig.node.json --noEmit 2>&1 | head -40)

Bash(git init && git add -A && git commit -m "Initial implementation of PDF Decomposer

Full Electron + React + TypeScript app with:
- Drag-and-drop PDF loading
- Visual page thumbnail grid with pdfjs Web Worker
- Lasso + shift/ctrl multi-selection
- Color-coded page groups
- Output config with custom filenames
- PDF splitting via pdf-lib
- Animated completion screen
- NSIS per-user installer + portable exe config" 2>&1)
